'''zhazhara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whacking|whacking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whacking|whacking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhazhara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzhæræth|zhæzhæræth]] || [[word:zhæzhæræj|zhæzhæræj]] || [[word:zhæzhæræsh|zhæzhæræsh]] || [[word:zhæzhæræ|zhæzhæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhazharath|zhazhazharath]] || [[word:zhazhazharaj|zhazhazharaj]] || [[word:zhazhazharash|zhazhazharash]] || [[word:zhazhazhara|zhazhazhara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazharath|zhazharath]] || [[word:zhazharaj|zhazharaj]] || [[word:zhazharash|zhazharash]] || [[word:zhazhara|zhazhara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhafrath|zhazhafrath]] || [[word:zhazhafraj|zhazhafraj]] || [[word:zhazhafrash|zhazhafrash]] || [[word:zhazhafraf|zhazhafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazharatha|zhazharatha]] || [[word:zhazharaja|zhazharaja]] || [[word:zhazharasha|zhazharasha]] || [[word:zhazharaka|zhazharaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazharath|zhazharath]] || [[word:zhazharaj|zhazharaj]] || [[word:zhazharash|zhazharash]] || [[word:zhazhara|zhazhara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazharathal|zhazharathal]] || [[word:zhazharajal|zhazharajal]] || [[word:zhazharashal|zhazharashal]] || [[word:zhazharakal|zhazharakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazharathatha|zhazharathatha]] || [[word:zhazharajaja|zhazharajaja]] || [[word:zhazharashasha|zhazharashasha]] || [[word:zhazharaka|zhazharaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazharathan|zhazharathan]] || [[word:zhazharajan|zhazharajan]] || [[word:zhazharashan|zhazharashan]] || [[word:zhazharakan|zhazharakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazharathaoro|zhazharathaoro]] || [[word:zhazharajaoro|zhazharajaoro]] || [[word:zhazharashaoro|zhazharashaoro]] || [[word:zhazharakaoro|zhazharakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
